calendar.matters:
Petition By Claimant To Establish Ownership Of Real Property And Related Orders.
Off Calendar Dec-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Fox for the petitioner.

Mr. Fox reported that it was a mistake on the Bank's part and that the bank did not have an interest in property. The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR #11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

Petition By Claimant To Establish Ownership Of Real Property And Related Orders.
Off Calendar Dec-05-2007 Continued To Dec-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
